🔧 Webhook Debug Test

1. Test Incoming Webhook (Simulate "Yes" Response)

This simulates what happens when a user clicks "Yes" on WhatsApp

2. Test Direct Webhook Call

Test the exact webhook URL from your question

3. Create Test Cancellation Request

Create a pending cancellation to test with

4. Test Cancellation Success Message

Test the exact webhook that should send the success message

5. Check Webhook Response

Test the exact webhook format from your URL
